name: elevenlabs_agent_tools
description: Deterministic reference for ElevenLabs Agent tool types — client, server, MCP, and system tools. Covers configuration, registration, and Marcela-specific tool design.

client.description: Executed in the browser. Agent invokes, client handles. Can return values if set to blocking.
client.configured_in: Admin > AI Agent > Tools tab (synced via POST /api/admin/marcela/configure-tools)
use_cases: Navigate to a page in the app

implemented.name: navigateToPage
implemented.description: Navigate user to a specific page in the portal

implemented.name: getCurrentContext
implemented.description: Get current page, user name, and role

server.description: HTTP webhooks called by ElevenLabs servers. Agent generates params from conversation context.
server.configured_in: Admin > AI Agent > Tools tab (synced via POST /api/admin/marcela/configure-tools)

implemented.name: getProperties
implemented.description: List all properties with key metrics

implemented.name: getNavigation
implemented.description: Get available portal pages and descriptions

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol servers providing tools/resources. Connected via SSE transport.
mcp.configured_in: ElevenLabs API (MCP servers not yet exposed in admin dashboard)
mcp.notes: Not available for Zero Retention Mode or HIPAA compliance.

system.description: Built-in platform tools provided by ElevenLabs.

language_detection.description: Auto-detect and switch to user's language
language_detection.configured_in: ElevenLabs API (system tools configured via agent update)
language_detection.notes: Requires additional languages configured in agent

end_call.use_case: Agent ends conversation after completing task

tool_call_sounds.description: Ambient audio during tool execution to fill silence
tool_call_sounds.configured_in: ElevenLabs API (tool call sounds configured via agent update)

blocking_vs_non_blocking.blocking: Agent waits for tool result before continuing. Configured via API per tool.
blocking_vs_non_blocking.non_blocking: Agent assumes success and continues. Default behavior.
